title: Copytrading underrated???
author: Prestigious-Cell6102
selftext:
want to share my experience, without promoting anything, as this is a very risky activity. Let me know your experience in the comments if you have any.
I have good experience in the markets, mainly stocks, but I also have a fair knowledge of cryptocurrencies. I've always been curious about forex and commodities, but since I also have a full-time job, its impossible to me to study em. And, let's be honest, time is the real value, right?
Through copy trading, by choosing a trader on my broker,
In just sixty days, my initial €1,200 became €1,860. A cumulative return of approximately 55%, achieved without any effort, other than the initial research of trader, which took just a few days.
The maximum drawdown was 8%, well above the maximum of 30% I had preset in the settings.
I think copy trading is underrated and too often associated with "fraud" simply because it's a very popular service among gurus who sell terrible services. Looking at my scenario, it gave me alpha that was uncorrelated to my main assets, delegating full execution to an expert trader. In my opinion, rather than burning accounts trying to guess the market direction, this is the smartest solution a trader with a small to medium budget can adopt. I think I'll try something similar with crypto trading as well. Updates will follow. Sorry for my bad eng guysss!!!
